---
name: Method / feature suggestion
about: Improve the methodology, a template, a hook, or the docs
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What you'd change**
The method, template, hook, or doc you'd improve — and where.

**Why**
What problem it solves or what it makes clearer. Keep it aligned with the project's bias toward
simple, declarative, model-agnostic guidance (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
